steps.t: Tantafod's clutch can be found on the western border of Thrór's Coomb, almost due south of Nár's Peak. Frithgeir has asked you to seek out Tantafod's …
Harcennun's clutch can be found west of Tantafod's clutch, near a large rock outcropping. Frithgeir asked you to seek out Harcennun's clutch and destr…
Frithgeir is at Zudrugund within Nár's Peak, north of the gwibers' clutches. You should return to Frithgeir and tell him of your heroic deeds.
